supplementary_fermion.label: a_0
supplementary_fermion.description: Supplementary real fermionic oscillator (Frappat 2000, p.219). Replaces grading operator (-1)^N in B(m,n) for m>=1.
supplementary_fermion.reference: Frappat et al., Dictionary on Lie Algebras and Superalgebras (2000)

fermions.description: Standard fermionic oscillators a_j^± with j=1,...,2

supplementary_fermion_relations.label: a_0
supplementary_fermion_relations.description: Relations for supplementary real fermionic oscillator

self_anticommutator.note: Real fermionic element with {a_0, a_0} = 1. See metadata for correspondence with Frappat's e.

anticommutes_with_fermions.description: Anticommutes with all standard fermionic oscillators

standard_fermion_anticommutators.description: Canonical anticommutation relations for standard fermionic oscillators

metric_matrix.description: Metric g_{ij} in basis [a_1^-, a_1^+, ..., a_m^-, a_m^+].

bosonic_commutators.description: Canonical commutation relations for bosonic oscillators

symplectic_matrix.description: Symplectic form J_{ij} in basis ['b_1_p', 'b_1_m', 'b_2_p', 'b_2_m'] with [b_i, b_j] = J_{ij}.

mixed_commutators.description: Commutation relations between different oscillator types

boson_fermion.description: Bosons commute with standard fermions (homogeneous case, κ=0)

fermion_supplementary.description: Standard fermions anticommute with supplementary fermion

basis.ordering_convention: Physical ordering: (1) Cartan: H_1,...,H_n (bosonic), H_{n+1},...,H_{n+m} (fermionic); (2) Positive even roots: bosonic long/short, fermionic long/short, mixed; (3) Negative even roots: same pattern; (4) Mixed even roots: bosonic, fermionic, boson-fermion; (5) Positive odd roots: E_del{k}_p (bosonic), E_eps{i}_p (fermionic); (6) Negative odd roots: E_del{k}_m (bosonic), E_eps{i}_m (fermionic).

generator_realization.description: Standard form with PBW ordering: a_0, a_j^±, b_k^±. E_{+ε_i} = -sqrt(2)*a_0*a_i^+ (sign from {a_i^+,a_0}=0). E_{-ε_i} = sqrt(2)*a_0*a_i^-. E_{±δ_k} = a_0*b_k^± (B(0,n) convention, coeff 1). See metadata.

H_1.note: Cartan (bosonic diff-type). Frappat p.219: H_k = b_k^+b_k^- - b_{k+1}^+b_{k+1}^-.

H_2.note: Cartan (boundary, bosonic-fermionic). Frappat p.219: H_n = b_n^+b_n^- + a_1^+a_1^-.

H_3.note: Cartan (fermionic diff-type). Frappat p.219: H_{n+i} = a_i^+a_i^- - a_{i+1}^+a_{i+1}^-.

H_4.note: Cartan (terminal, fermionic). Unified formula: (a_m^+a_m^- - a_m^-a_m^+) = 2a_m^+a_m^- - 1. Frappat p.219.

E_2eps1_p.note: Long even root +2ε_1. Frappat p.219. NOTE: vanishes in standard CAR realization ((a_i^±)^2 = 0).

E_2eps1_m.note: Long even root -2ε_1. Frappat p.219. NOTE: vanishes in standard CAR realization ((a_i^±)^2 = 0).

E_2eps2_p.note: Long even root +2ε_2. Frappat p.219. NOTE: vanishes in standard CAR realization ((a_i^±)^2 = 0).

E_2eps2_m.note: Long even root -2ε_2. Frappat p.219. NOTE: vanishes in standard CAR realization ((a_i^±)^2 = 0).

E_del1_del2_pm.note: Mixed even root δ_1-δ_2. Frappat p.220.

E_eps1_eps2_pm.note: Mixed even root ε_1-ε_2. Frappat p.219.

E_eps1_del1_pm.note: Mixed even root ε_1-δ_1. Frappat p.219.

E_eps1_del1_mp.note: Mixed even root -δ_1+ε_1. Frappat p.219: b_k^+ a_i^-. PBW: a_i^- b_k^+ -> reordered as a_i^- first (a before b).

E_eps1_del2_pm.note: Mixed even root ε_1-δ_2. Frappat p.219.

E_eps1_del2_mp.note: Mixed even root -δ_2+ε_1. Frappat p.219: b_k^+ a_i^-. PBW: a_i^- b_k^+ -> reordered as a_i^- first (a before b).

E_eps2_del1_pm.note: Mixed even root ε_2-δ_1. Frappat p.219.

E_eps2_del1_mp.note: Mixed even root -δ_1+ε_2. Frappat p.219: b_k^+ a_i^-. PBW: a_i^- b_k^+ -> reordered as a_i^- first (a before b).

E_eps2_del2_pm.note: Mixed even root ε_2-δ_2. Frappat p.219.

E_eps2_del2_mp.note: Mixed even root -δ_2+ε_2. Frappat p.219: b_k^+ a_i^-. PBW: a_i^- b_k^+ -> reordered as a_i^- first (a before b).

E_del1_p.transformation: b_1^+ e -> a_0 b_1^+ ([b,a_0]=0, no sign change)
E_del1_p.note: Odd root +δ_1. B(0,n) convention: a_0 b_k^+. B(m,n) Frappat: sqrt(2)*a_0*b_k^+. See metadata.

E_del1_m.transformation: e b_1^- -> a_0 b_1^- (already PBW order)
E_del1_m.note: Odd root -δ_1. B(0,n) convention: a_0 b_k^-. B(m,n) Frappat: sqrt(2)*a_0*b_k^-. See metadata.

E_del2_p.transformation: b_2^+ e -> a_0 b_2^+ ([b,a_0]=0, no sign change)
E_del2_p.note: Odd root +δ_2. B(0,n) convention: a_0 b_k^+. B(m,n) Frappat: sqrt(2)*a_0*b_k^+. See metadata.

E_del2_m.transformation: e b_2^- -> a_0 b_2^- (already PBW order)
E_del2_m.note: Odd root -δ_2. B(0,n) convention: a_0 b_k^-. B(m,n) Frappat: sqrt(2)*a_0*b_k^-. See metadata.

E_eps1_p.note: Odd root +ε_1. Frappat p.219: E_{ε_i} = a_i^+ e. PBW reorder: a_i^+ e = -sqrt(2)*a_0*a_i^+. Coefficient is -sqrt(2) (sign from anticommutation with a_0).

E_eps1_m.note: Odd root -ε_1. Frappat p.219: E_{-ε_i} = e a_i^-. PBW: already in order. Coefficient sqrt(2).

E_eps2_p.note: Odd root +ε_2. Frappat p.219: E_{ε_i} = a_i^+ e. PBW reorder: a_i^+ e = -sqrt(2)*a_0*a_i^+. Coefficient is -sqrt(2) (sign from anticommutation with a_0).

E_eps2_m.note: Odd root -ε_2. Frappat p.219: E_{-ε_i} = e a_i^-. PBW: already in order. Coefficient sqrt(2).

structure_constants.description: Non-zero brackets [X, Y] = sum_Z c_Z Z. For odd-odd pairs: anticommutator {X,Y}. Otherwise: commutator [X,Y]. Coefficients follow implementation convention (E_{±δ_k} = a_0 b_k^±, E_{±ε_i} = ∓sqrt(2)*a_0*a_i^±); see metadata. Computed via oscillator algebra engine (oscillator_algebra.py).

metadata.reference: Frappat et al., Dictionary on Lie Algebras and Superalgebras (2000), p.219-220. B(2,2) oscillator realization.
metadata.supplementary_fermion_convention: Frappat's supplementary fermion e (with e^2 = 1) is implemented as a_0 via e = sqrt(2) * a_0 (so that {a_0, a_0} = 1). Consequence: odd generators E_{±δ_k} = a_0 b_k^± in this file correspond to (1/sqrt(2)) * E_{±δ_k}^{Frappat}. Even generators and Cartan elements are unaffected.
